title: Tasty Toasted Thai Tofu Khao Pad
description: A crispy and flavorful Thai dish made with flour tortilla, wood-fired baked tofu, and spices, served as a solo dinner, jain-friendly and in the form of khao-pad, cooked on a tava-griddle.

ingredients.name: firm tofu
ingredients.notes: drained and cut into small cubes

instructions: Preheat the tava-griddle over medium heat.
In a small bowl, mix together soy sauce, tamarind paste, palm sugar, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chopped Thai red chili to the bowl and stir well.
Brush the flour tortilla pieces with vegetable oil and place them on the preheated tava-griddle.
Wood-fire bake the tofu cubes until they are golden brown and crispy.
Add the baked tofu cubes to the bowl with the sauce and stir well to coat.
Add the chopped basil leaves to the bowl and stir well.
Place the toasted flour tortilla pieces on a serving plate and top with the tofu and sauce mixture.
